2604.01210.title: CliffSearch: Structured Agentic Co-Evolution over Theory and Code for Scientific Algorithm Discovery
2604.01210.paper_summary: Scientific algorithm discovery is iterative: hypotheses are proposed, implemented, stress-tested, and revised. Current LLM-guided search systems accelerate proposal generation, but often under-represent scientific structure by optimizing code-only artifacts with weak correctness/originality gating. We present CliffSearch, an agentic evolutionary framework in which the core evolution operators (pair selection, crossover, mutation, and review) are implemented as LLM agents, and the loop is designed around three principles: (1) each node is a structured scientific artifact, instantiated in either theory+code or code_only mode, (2) reviewer judgments of correctness and originality are first-class selection gates alongside optimization of the benchmark metric of interest, and (3) mutation is split into exploration and correction pathways with distinct objectives. Exploration mutation imports ideas from adjacent scientific domains to increase novelty, while correction mutation performs targeted evidence-guided repair using reviewer signals over theory, code, benchmark results, and runtime errors. We illustrate the framework on three benchmark-grounded studies: transformer hyper-connection evolution, optimizer discovery on a fixed nanoGPT stack, and a smaller native-optimizer ablation. Across these settings, the same loop supports explicit metric direction, reproducible persistence, and reviewer-gated comparison of discoveries under controlled search conditions. The result is a discovery workflow that prioritizes scientific interpretability and correctness while optimizing task metrics under controlled novelty constraints, rather than maximizing candidate throughput alone. Full run artifacts, interactive visualizations, and exported best nodes for the reported studies are available at https://cliffsearch.ai .
2604.01210.paper_summary_zh: 科學算法的發現是迭代的：提出假設、實施、壓力測試和修訂。目前的 LLM 引導搜索系統加速了提案生成，但通常通過優化僅包含代碼的工件來低估科學結構，這些工件的正確性/原創性閾值較弱。我們提出了 CliffSearch，一個代理進化框架，其中核心進化運算子（配對選擇、交叉、突變和審查）作為 LLM 代理實現，並且該循環圍繞三個原則設計：（1）每個節點都是一個結構化的科學工件，以理論+代碼或僅代碼模式實例化，（2）審查者對正確性和原創性的判斷是首要的選擇閘，與對感興趣的基準指標的優化並列，以及（3）突變被分為探索和修正路徑，具有不同的目標。探索突變從相鄰的科學領域引入想法，以增加新穎性，而修正突變則使用審查者信號對理論、代碼、基準結果和運行時錯誤進行針對性的證據引導修復。我們在三個基準研究上說明了該框架：Transformer超連接進化、在固定 nanoGPT 堆棧上的優化器發現，以及一個較小的本地優化器消融。在這些設置中，同一循環支持明確的指標方向、可重複的持續性，以及在受控搜索條件下對發現的審查者閘比較。其結果是一個發現工作流程，優先考慮科學可解釋性和正確性，同時在受控的新穎性約束下優化任務指標，而不是僅僅最大化候選通量。完整的運行工件、互動可視化和報告研究的最佳節點可在 https://cliffsearch.ai 獲得。
2604.01210.author: Youssef Mroueh et.al.
2604.01210.authors: Youssef Mroueh, Carlos Fonseca, Brian Belgodere, David Cox
